message:
fix: recognize nested workspace .beads JSONL IDs in git history correlation (bd-yhgr)

Add workspace ID alias support so that raw (unprefixed) bead IDs from
nested workspace JSONL diffs correctly match their prefixed counterparts
in the histories map. Introduces build_workspace_id_aliases() to extract
the raw→prefixed mapping from issue source_repo metadata, and
correlate_histories_with_git_aliases() which merges these aliases into
the known_ids lookup. Updates both robot-mode and TUI call sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
